name: Tax Court Judicial Officers Survivors Annuity Fund

eligibility.description: Tax Court judges or special trial judges who file a written election while in office.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Judges and special trial judges can elect to provide annuities for surviving spouses and dependent children via a 3.5% salary deduction, creating a tax-advantaged survivor benefit.
